description: Orchestration pipeline. The `bootstrap` step is a permanent anchor (always complete). Slice steps are appended after it by sync-prd-orchestration.ts (from the PRD Flow Inventory) and orchestration-planner.ts (from the planner queue). Do not run code agents from this file directly — it only declares step order + dependencies.

workload.title: Pipeline anchor
workload.notes: Permanent anchor. Kept `complete` in status.json so it never executes. New slice steps attach after the `setup` step (orchestration.prd-flow-map.json attachAfterStepId).

workload.title: Project setup (always first)
workload.notes: ALWAYS the first phase (see .cursor/core/rules/05-project-setup.mdc + /setup). Pin a clean, up-to-date stack + minimal v0 pnpm catalog, enable clean-code rules, pick only the apps in docs/project.config.md (keep the monorepo), and ship a visible first page. Every feature step depends on this. Priority 0 so it is picked first.

workload.title: Category Grid
workload.notes: Auto-appended from docs/prd PRD Flow Inventory + orchestration.prd-flow-map.json. Create user story + plan if not present before implementing.

workload.title: Selection UX — Primary CTA (P0.1)
workload.notes: Client P0.1: selection-first product page, strip name/tel from hero, luxury-brand-gate on apps/web diff.

workload.title: Selection UX — List Overlay (P0.2)
workload.notes: Client P0.2: add-to-selection on tile image overlay, Toteme cadence.

workload.title: Selection UX — Soft Drawer (P0.3)
workload.notes: Client P0.3: soft panel motion matching header nav.

workload.title: Catalogue — Dress-only public (P1)
workload.notes: Client P1 + #1/#2: filter public catalogue/home to dresses, hide sacs/foulards, three public dress slugs with 2-3 unique PHOTO-* gallery frames each.

workload.title: Storefront Shell — Nav four links (#7)
workload.notes: Client #7: Collection · À propos · Livraison · Contact. Remove sacs/foulards strip from header.

workload.title: Editorial — Notre histoire & À propos (#4, #8)
workload.notes: Client #4/#8: rewrite à-propos with viscose story + petites séries narrative. Tri-locale fr/en/ru. Maison Lens tone gate.

workload.title: Product Detail — Photography editorial (#6)
workload.notes: Client #6: taller gallery, fabric/detail frames, editorial full-bleed hero per product.

workload.title: Editorial — Capsule & série limitée (#5)
workload.notes: Client #5: série limitée/collection capsule badge on home hero + product, no fake scarcity copy.

workload.title: Storefront — Broken links audit (#3)
workload.notes: Client #3: sitemap + 404 pass, seed slug parity, fix all broken product links.

workload.title: CI — Brainstorm round graft (P00000)
workload.notes: P00000: prove check-gate blocks gh pr ready; smoke with BRAINSTORM_ROUND_ENABLED=false on this PR, then default-on after smoke passes on next tracking PR.
